generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for the 1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing vehicle state information for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance RawLiDARData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking, DataTranslationComponent
]

instance ProcessedVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle state information for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationComponent
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point cloud data into structured object tracks for ACC-relevant streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data visualization, projected driving path, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transfers ACC system processing (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands) to cloud-based resources to alleviate on-board hardware constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedCalculationAction, ActuationCommandsAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands through UI; developers use data collection for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data and object tracks via UI"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save processed sensor data for future analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate reports from collected data for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading lead vehicle detection processing to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedCalculationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading speed calculation processing to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ActuationCommandsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading actuation command generation to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system via remote command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command to vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated vehicle with ACC system for autonomous driving"
    base:contains LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands including desired speed calculation, emergency braking, and ACC enable/disable are transmitted from the DT to the physical vehicle via Wi-Fi UDP. The Data Translation component serializes control messages for actuation systems such as motor, steering servo, and vehicle state control. ROS2 facilitates communication between control components, and commands are executed by the Actuation FE and steering servo components."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronization between physical and digital components requires 100 ms accuracy for safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by hardware limitations. This temporal granularity ensures precise coordination for computation offloading and real-time data processing."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows the ISO 23247 reference architecture with three entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User), each implemented as ROS2 packages containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The Physical Twin Entity departs from ISO standard by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), and all entities are deployed on separate hardware components. Coordination is managed through ROS2's communication framework."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. The system requires low end-to-end latency to support real-time ACC operations, with data serialization and translation managed by the Data Translation component."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Computation offloading for ACC is performed on cloud infrastructure to alleviate resource constraints of vehicle ECUs. Specific hosting platforms, storage requirements, scalability mechanisms, and deployment models beyond cloud-based computation are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems uses ROS2 for internal communication and references OPC Unified Architecture as a potential protocol for data exchange and interoperability per ISO 23247 standard guidelines."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2:2021 reference architecture, defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) perform tasks including data transformation to human-interpretable formats, actuation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) specified as an implementation technology for FEs."
]
